rule_text: Internal section grid follows a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60, layout.grid.image_text_split).
intent: Constrain layouts to a small set of predictable grid patterns.
summary: Internal section grid uses 12-column model with layouts: 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (~40/60, layout.grid.image_text_split).
